creator: jkois@freebsd.org
text:
The website from the original PR (http://bsdgroup.alshome.be) is dead.  So
the project is probably dead, too (as we did not get any updates from the
sender of this PR since then).

But I will keep this PR open for another 2 weeks.  If there is no change in
the situation until then, I will close this PR.

J. Kois

--
Johann Kois
jkois@FreeBSD.org
FreeBSD Documentation Project
FreeBSD German Documentation Project - https://doc.bsdgroup.de
